title: A DeathBan
description: A light plugin that bans a player when he dies
body:
# DeathBan
DeathBan is a self explanatory, simple and lightweight plugin which bans a player when he dies.

## Config
```
# DeathBan Configuration
# Message shown to permanently banned players
ban-message: "You have been banned for dying!"
```
## Commands
- /deathban exempt <player> - Add player to exemption list
- /deathban unexempt <player> - Remove player from exemption list
- /deathban list - See who's exempt
- /deathban reload - Reload config
- /reviveall - Unban all players at once
